chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1458 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 27-05-2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G a/w Ghulam Murtaza Sario, Assistant Executive Provincial Highways Sub-Division, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG files parawise comments on behalf of respondents No.1&2, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner. Petitioner and his counsel submit that Departmental Appeal of the petitioner pending before the Secretary, Works & Services Department, Government of Sindh (respondent No.1) available at page-45 of the petition is not being decided and directions may be issued to the respondent No.1 to decide the same within shortest possible time. Learned AAG did not convert the above proposal and records his no objection. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of with direction to the respondent No.1 to decide the Departmental Appeal of the petitioner within a period of 30-days in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
